steps.title: Find the cause and effect
steps.content: Flying buttresses eliminated the need for thick, short walls. The next sentence explains the consequence: Gothic cathedrals could have thinner, higher walls.

steps.title: Reject other transitions
steps.content: A signals similarity, but the second sentence gives a result. B introduces an example, though the sentence states what the invention made possible. C signals contrast, which contradicts the cause-and-effect relationship. The answer is D.
